shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && rg -n "calendar dialog|Calendar|dialog|translate" src test* 2>/dev/null | head -200 && rg --files src | head -80'
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,100p' src/calendar_container.tsx && sed -n '1270,1360p' src/calendar.tsx && sed -n '1,180p' src/test/calendar_container.test.tsx && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "node -e 'const p=require(\"./package.json\"); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))' && git diff -- src/calendar_container.tsx src/test/calendar_container.test.tsx && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-datepicker Safari translate calendar dialog translate no"'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add 'react-datepicker calendar dialogs must opt out of browser translation. The shared CalendarContainer now renders translate=\"no\" on the calendar dialog element, preventing Safari and similar browser translation passes from rewriting live React-managed calendar text nodes. The container regression test asserts the attribute; focused Jest and TypeScript checks pass.' -t 'react-datepicker calendar dialog translation opt-out' --unit-type decision -l label_react-datepicker -l label_bugfix -s codex -i 0.8"
